notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with pixel art sprites, UFO, shields, audio, and wave progression, but the shield generation logic has a bug (pBox reassignment to null on a const-like variable causes a JS error), alien bullet collision with pBullet has a minor const reassignment issue, and the score display uses newline in fillText which doesn't render multiline natively on canvas.

An otherwise incredibly feature-complete and well-crafted game is ruined by a fatal JS error (reassigning a const variable 'pBox') that crashes the game loop the moment the player shoots their own shield.

The game has decent controls and recognizable Space Invaders presentation, but a likely runtime error from reassigning a const in shield collision logic severely undermines functionality, stability, and overall playability.
